title: Apple Q2 2026 Earnings: AI Strategy and R&D Focus
text: Apple Q2 2026: 17% revenue growth, revenue $111.18B (vs $109.66B expected), EPS $2.01 (vs $1.95 expected). Apple announced partnership with Google to use Gemini AI model for Siri. Cook said Apple will bring more personalized Siri this year. R&D spending crossed 10% revenue for first time in 30 years, increased twice as fast as sales. Cook flagged significantly higher memory costs in current quarter, believing memory costs will drive increasing business impact. WWDC 2026 next major event. More people planning iPhone upgrades due to AI features including on-device processing and revamped Siri. If WWDC introduces impressive AI tools, could spark major upgrade cycle.
